title: ophrys × gibbosa
intro: Ophrys × gibbosa, also known as the Hoary Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Ophrys genus, characterized by its unique, bee-like appearance. Traditionally, the Ophrys × gibbosa has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Ophrys × gibbosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
